info.name: DynamicUiCode - Complete API Collection
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for DynamicUiCode backend.

EXECUTION ORDER (FK dependencies):
1. Products
2. Categories (requires productId)
3. Pages (requires categoryId)
4. Widgets (requires pageId, optional parentWidgetId)
5. Widget Properties (requires widgetId)
6. Widget Rules (requires widgetId)
7. Widget Actions (requires widgetId)
8. OnLoad Services (requires pageId)
9. UI Config (read-only, full tree)
10. Mock Web Services (no DB)

item.name: 1. Products
item.description: CRUD operations for Products. Execute FIRST (no FK dependencies).

item.name: 2. Categories
item.description: CRUD operations for Categories. Requires productId from step 1.

item.name: 3. Pages
item.description: CRUD operations for Pages. Requires categoryId from step 2.

item.name: 4. Widgets
item.description: CRUD operations for Widgets. Requires pageId from step 3. parentWidgetId is optional (for nested widgets).

item.name: 4h. Create Widget - Address Textbox (nested in card 7)
4i. Create Widget - Property Type Dropdown (nested in card 7)
5. Widget Properties
item.description: CRUD operations for Widget Properties. Requires widgetId from step 4.

item.name: 6. Widget Rules
item.description: CRUD operations for Widget Rules. Requires widgetId from step 4.

item.name: 7. Widget Actions
item.description: CRUD operations for Widget Actions. Requires widgetId from step 4.

item.name: 8. OnLoad Services
item.description: CRUD operations for OnLoad Services. Requires pageId from step 3.

item.name: 9. UI Config (Read-Only)
item.description: Fetches full UI configuration tree for a product. Read-only aggregation endpoint.

item.name: 10. Mock Web Services
item.description: Standalone mock services (no DB). Used by OnLoad services and Widget Actions.

item.name: 11. Data Sources
item.description: UI Data Sources for dropdown widgets (static/dynamic options).
